What we install

Built into your trim, not stuck onto it

Every job is disassembled, routed and reassembled the way the factory would do it — panels off, wiring hidden, everything buttoned back up tight.

FLAGSHIP

Symphony ambient lighting

Full-cabin fibre-optic lighting across dash, doors and console. 64+ colours, music sync, brightness and zone control from your phone.

Starlight headliners

Hundreds of hand-placed fibre stars across your roof lining. A Rolls-style ceiling in your daily.

Dash cam hardwiring

Front and rear cams wired clean to the fuse box — parking mode on, zero dangling cables.

CarPlay & screen upgrades

Modern wireless CarPlay / Android Auto screens fitted into older interiors without butchering the dash.

Remote start kits

Warm cabin in winter, cool in summer — installed and tested, keys in hand the same day.

Underglow & exterior LED

Underglow, grille and accent lighting, lit tweeters, speaker rings and vent kits to finish the look.

Recent installs

Every badge. Every trim. Same finish.

From a 2012 Sonata to a 2025 Accord — if it has an interior, we can light it. Shot straight off the phone, no studio.

Hundreds more on Instagram → @6automods

How it works

DM to done in a day

Reach out

Call, text or DM with your year, make and model. Replies usually land in minutes, not days.

Pick your setup

Choose zones, colours and extras. You approve the exact kit before a single panel comes off.

The install

Most cars are in and out in 2–4 hours. Wiring hidden, trim re-seated, everything torqued back to spec.

Rolling glow

Full walkthrough of the app and modes, plus aftercare support whenever you need it. Warranty stays intact.

Book your build
